Name: Blog Posts API
Description: Retrieves blog posts from the public JSONPlaceholder API. Use for questions about posts, titles, or content written by a specific user.

Parameters.Name: UserId
Parameters.Description: The numeric author ID to filter posts by (1–10). Use null to return posts from all users.

Name: User Details API
Description: Looks up profile details for a specific user by ID from the JSONPlaceholder API. Includes name, email, address, phone, and company. Use for questions about a specific user.

Parameters.Name: UserId
Parameters.Description: The numeric user ID to look up (1–10). This is required.
